shard_theme: multilingual weird cases and under-covered languages
priority_reason: EU/EEA coverage is likely to be distorted by English-only discovery; local-language public-sector and regulator records may expose edge-case evidence gaps.
source_family_priority: Public-sector registers and procurement; Regulator and enforcement sources; News and investigative reporting
evidence_goal: Find T0/T1 leads on public-sector AI incidents, disclosure gaps, or institutionally strange deployments.
translation_risk: Medium: machine translation can miss legal nuance; human review needed before legal interpretation.
paper_thesis_use: Supports LIMEN method/limitations section on language-conditioned observability and future Atlas/GAIA multilingual dashboards.
visualization_hook: Country-language-source-family heatmap; lead funnel by evidence tier
next_smallest_move: Probe official AI/register/procurement and regulator surfaces before general news expansion.

shard_theme: multilingual weird cases and under-covered languages
